proposal_text:
Title: Whisker & Watcher
Concept: Perceive the world through extraordinary animal senses, uncovering hidden emotional echoes and shaping a deeply personal narrative.
Website Product Description: Prepare to redefine your perception in *Whisker & Watcher*, a groundbreaking game where you experience the world through the heightened, unique senses of an animal. Beyond typical sight and sound, your "Observational Focus" allows you to interpret subtle scents, faint vibrations, and environmental cues, uncovering details that are often invisible to others. As you engage with your surroundings, activate "Empathy Mode" to reveal profound "Echo states" – vivid emotional memories and untold stories imprinted upon the world around you. You won't just witness history; you'll *feel* the lingering joy, sorrow, longing, or wonder of past events, fostering an intimate connection with every character and location. Every detail you perceive and every emotional echo you uncover directly shapes your understanding and influences a rich, unfolding narrative. This isn't just a game; it's a deeply personal journey where your unique perspective transforms mere observation into an unforgettable emotional adventure, making every playthrough distinctly yours and leaving a lasting impact on your own heart.

Title: Captain Chronos: The Current Shaper
Concept: Master the unseen currents. Every choice shapes the city's fate.
Website Product Description: Step into the shoes of Captain Chronos, a hero unlike any other. You possess an extraordinary gift: the power to perceive and subtly influence the very flow of humanity. See crowds not as chaos, but as intricate currents you can navigate, phase through, and even gently reshape with your unique abilities.

Your mission is to avert disaster and save lives, but not with brute force. Instead, you'll use your unique perception to spot critical moments and guide the masses, subtly influencing their actions and perceptions to create strategic openings or prevent catastrophe. Every intervention you make, every choice you face, carries real weight. Will you create a path for escape, distract a threat, or subtly alter the course of events? Each decision will ripple through the city, leading to visible and meaningful consequences that define your legacy as an understated hero. Master the currents, make your mark, and witness the profound impact of your strategic choices in a world that shifts with your every move.
